programme.title: Test: AUS v SA: 2002 Gilchrist's Best
programme.desc: Adam Gilchrist lights up the Wanderers with a career-best performance.

programme.title: Test: AUS v SA: 2005 WACA Showdown
programme.desc: Brad Hodge smashes a double ton at the WACA, but South Africa digs deep as Jacques Rudolph resists late, setting up a gripping final day.

programme.title: Test: AUS v SA: 2006 Brett Lee the MVP
programme.desc: Brett Lee delivers with both bat and ball in Johannesburg as Australia chases a memorable last-over victory.

programme.title: Test: AUS v SA: 2009 Graeme Smith Defies
programme.desc: Graeme Smith defies injury to return to the pitch at the SCG, setting the stage for one of Test crickets most courageous final overs.

programme.title: Test: AUS v SA: 2011 Pat Cummins Debut
programme.desc: A teenage Pat Cummins bursts onto the Test stage in Johannesburg, batting a thrilling final over not to be missed.

programme.title: Test: AUS v SA: 2012 Captain Clarke
programme.desc: Michael Clarke takes charge in Brisbane with a captain's innings for the ages.

programme.title: Test: AUS v SA: 2022 Boxing Day Double
programme.desc: The MCG Swelters as a double century by David Warner cools off South Africa under the Boxing Day spotlight.

programme.title: Test: AUS v SA: 2023 Khawaja's SCG Ton
programme.desc: Usman Khawaja battles South Africa's bowling attack and looming rain at the SCG in a career-best performance.

programme.title: Test: 2024/25 AUS v IND 2nd Test
programme.desc: After India's dominance in the first Test, the Aussies aim to bounce back in the annual day/night match at Adelaide Oval.

programme.title: Test: 2024/25 AUS v IND 3rd Test
programme.desc: Locked at 1-1, the series heads to the Gabba, the venue where India secured the Border-Gavaskar Trophy with a famous win four years ago.

programme.title: Test: 2024/25 AUS v IND 4th Test
programme.desc: The series is locked at 1-1 a piece heading into the fourth Test at the MCG.

programme.title: Test: 2024/25 AUS v IND 5th Test
programme.desc: The dramatic Border-Gavaskar Trophy reaches its conclusion at the world famous Sydney Cricket Ground.

programme.title: IPL Mini: FNL RCB v PBKS
programme.desc: A new champion will be crowned as RCB and the Kings clash in the 2025 IPL Final in Ahmedabad.

programme.title: Test: 2022/23 AUS v SA 1st Test
programme.desc: After retaining the Frank Worrell Trophy, the Aussies travel to Brisbane to face South Africa in the first of three tests.

programme.title: Test: 2022/23 AUS v SA 2nd Test
programme.desc: One of cricket's great traditions, the Boxing Day Test, sees Australia take on South Africa and their imposing pace attack at the MCG.

programme.title: Test: 2022/23 AUS v SA 3rd Test
programme.desc: Australia's test summer concludes with the traditional New Year's Test from the SCG against South Africa.

programme.title: Test: 2023 IND v AUS 1st Test
programme.desc: Following a dominating home summer, Australia travel to India for a highly-anticipated four-test series. The first test begins in Nagpur.

programme.title: Test: 2023 IND v AUS 2nd Test
programme.desc: The Aussies capitulated in the first test, losing by an innings and 132 runs as they return to Arun Jaitley Stadium where they haven't won since 1959.

programme.title: Test: 2023 IND v AUS 3rd Test
programme.desc: India have retained the Border-Gavaskar Trophy after their convincing win over Australia in the second test. Can the Aussies bounce back in Indore?

programme.title: Test: 2023 IND v AUS 4th Test
programme.desc: The world's largest cricket stadium hosts the fourth and final test of Australia's tour of India. The Aussies can level the series 2-2 with a victory.

programme.title: Test: 2023/24 AUS v PAK 1st Test
programme.desc: Australia's summer of cricket gets underway with the West Test. Perth hosts the first of three matches against Pakistan.

programme.title: Test: 2023/24 AUS v PAK 1st Test
programme.desc: Australia's summer of cricket gets underway with the West Test. Perth hosts the first of three matches against Pakistan.

programme.title: Test: 2023/24 AUS v PAK 2nd Test
programme.desc: It's the biggest day on the test calendar: Boxing Day. Australia face Pakistan in the second match of their three game series.

programme.title: Test: 2023/24 AUS v PAK 3rd Test
programme.desc: In the final Test match of his career, David Warner prepares to say farewell in front of a home crowd at the SCG.

programme.title: Test: 2024 AUS v WI 1st Test
programme.desc: A new era begins in Adelaide with Steve Smith set to open the batting for Australia against the West Indies.

programme.title: Test: 2024 AUS v WI 2nd Test
programme.desc: After their comprehensive win in Adelaide, Australia head to the Gabba for a day/night test match against the West Indies.

programme.title: Test: 2024 NZL v AUS 1st Test
programme.desc: For the first time in eight years, Australia are in New Zealand for a Test-series. The historic Basin Reserve hosts the first test match.

programme.title: Test: 2024 NZL v AUS 2nd Test
programme.desc: Australia were convincing in their first Test win, thanks to Nathan Lyon's ten wicket haul. Hagley Oval in Christchurch hosts the Second Test.

programme.title: Test: 2024/25 AUS v IND 1st Test
programme.desc: The Border-Gavaskar Trophy will be contested over a five-Test series for the first time in over 30 years. Don't miss a ball on Fox Cricket.

programme.title: Test: 2024/25 AUS v IND 2nd Test
programme.desc: After India's dominance in the first Test, the Aussies aim to bounce back in the annual day/night match at Adelaide Oval.

programme.title: Test: 2024/25 AUS v IND 3rd Test
programme.desc: Locked at 1-1, the series heads to the Gabba, the venue where India secured the Border-Gavaskar Trophy with a famous win four years ago.

programme.title: Test: 2024/25 AUS v IND 4th Test
programme.desc: The series is locked at 1-1 a piece heading into the fourth Test at the MCG.

programme.title: Test: 2024/25 AUS v IND 5th Test
programme.desc: The dramatic Border-Gavaskar Trophy reaches its conclusion at the world famous Sydney Cricket Ground.
